title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Blurr
subTitle: Suspicious about the circumstances surrounding her twin sister's death, a woman with progressive blindness searches for answers that eventually lead her down a dangerous path.

title: Aattral
subTitle: Arjun's father, who is a mechanic, manages to get INR 10 lakh to fulfil Arjun's dream of developing an automatic car. However, the former is robbed and killed by a mysterious man.

title: The Kashmir Files
subTitle: A young college student sets out to uncover the truth behind his parents' brutal killings in Kashmir, leading him to a web of lies and conspiracies.

title: Daring Rakhwala
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Good Newwz
subTitle: Two married couples are unsuccessful in conceiving and seek medical treatment. However, they end up in a complicated situation after their doctor makes a blunder.

title: Valatty
subTitle: Upon falling in love, Tomy and Amalu, two dogs, expect babies together against the wishes of their families. However, when they decide to run away, Amalu gets kidnapped, creating more problems.

title: Enemy
subTitle: Rajiv grows envious of his childhood friend, Chozhan, as he is better than him at most things. The frenemies grow apart only to meet under very different circumstances several years later.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
subTitle: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Makkhi
subTitle: After reincarnating as a fly, a murderer decides to take revenge on his rival, who killed him, and teams up with a woman to destroy the killer's life.

title: Aparichit - The Stranger
subTitle: A meek lawyer, frustrated with his inability to change the system, develops a vigilante alter-ego to mete out justice to criminals. However, the police soon set out to track down the vigilante.

title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Gumnaam
subTitle: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Dobaaraa
subTitle: A thunderstorm and a television set facilitate a woman to connect with the past and save a young boy's life. However, the turn of events put her present at risk.

title: Darlings
subTitle: Badru desperately wishes her abusive husband mends his ill-treatment of her. However, when her situation worsens, Badru takes matters into her own hands.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Mahi
subTitle: Former cricketer Mahendra marries Mahima, a doctor with a passion for cricket. However, upon discovering her exceptional skills, he encourages her to pursue a professional career in the sport.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
subTitle: In the small-town of Bareilly, a free-spirited Bitti hates that she is being pressured into getting married. But when she reads a book that reflects her life, she sets out to find its author.

title: Mahaveer No.1
subTitle: A young orphan, White, challenges the sly Adikesavalu for control of the Ongole market and his daughter. Their fight unearths a past of greed, injustice and a simmering quest for revenge.

title: Policegiri
subTitle: Tired of the rampant corruption fueled by Nagori Subramaniam, DCP Rudra takes a defiant stand. He launches a one-man crusade to take down the crime lord and dismantle his criminal syndicate.

title: Shaadi Mein Zaroor Aana
subTitle: Satyendra and Aarti meet for an arranged marriage and end up falling in love with each other. Their lives, however, change completely when she runs away on their wedding day.

title: The Bhootnii
subTitle: After a heartbreak, Shantanu unknowingly summons a spirit named Mohabbat, whose obsessive presence begins to disrupt the peace of the entire college campus.

title: Navsari Ka Rahasya
subTitle: Soon after moving into their new palatial house, a couple begins experiencing paranormal phenomena. An investigation leads them to the chilling story of the house's previous inhabitants.

title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
subTitle: A man is challenged to work in a field and produce a huge harvest by the end of the season in order to marry the love of his life.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: IPC 376
subTitle: A police officer looks into an informer who can predict future murders in a mysterious way. Soon, she unearths a sinister murder mystery that leads to a shocking truth.

title: Farrey
subTitle: Brought up in an orphanage, child prodigy Niyati gets admitted into a prestigious school. Soon, surrounded by money, she gets engulfed in a cheating racket.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: Luck by Chance
subTitle: Vikram can't believe his luck when he is chosen for a Bollywood lead role. However, the role may ruin his relationship with his girlfriend.

title: Ghost
subTitle: When an inexperienced lawyer chooses to defend a young politician who is accused of murdering his wife, a spirit begins to pursue her.

title: Gully Boy
subTitle: The life of an underdog rapper from Dharavi who struggles to express his views on social issues through rapping, changes completely after he bumps into Shrikant alias MC Sher.

title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
subTitle: When a renowned tech entrepreneur is abducted upon returning to India, a police officer seeks the help of her ex-boyfriend, a former cop living with his wife, to aid in the rescue mission.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

title: Businessman 2
subTitle: A money-minded tycoon gets into a beneficial relationship with a woman. Soon, he learns about the differences in his family and decides to end them.

title: Tirangaa
subTitle: Brigadier Suryadev Singh and Shivajirao Waghle, a police inspector, work together to track down a terrorist who plans to evade India.

title: Radhe
subTitle: Radhe, a daredevil encounter specialist of the Mumbai Police force, vows to knock down the crime syndicate led by an evil drug lord.
